childElements.name: NoOffer

omniProcessElements.name: OfferConfigurator
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Back", "previousWidth" : "4", "nextLabel" : "Save and Next", "nextWidth" : "4", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : "Offer Configurator", "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: RejectionScreenSSE
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "600", "condition" : "<=", "field" : "creditScore" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Community Named Page", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%ContextId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : true, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "targetName" : "Application_Rejection" }
